title: Add score() method to every fitted tree / ensemble estimator
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin.score = mean accuracy; RegressorMixin.score = R². ferrolearn-tree currently has neither on any of its 22 fitted estimators. Add to:
- FittedDecisionTreeClassifier / Regressor
- FittedExtraTreeClassifier / Regressor
- FittedRandomForestClassifier / Regressor
- FittedExtraTreesClassifier / Regressor
- FittedGradientBoostingClassifier / Regressor
- FittedHistGradientBoostingClassifier / Regressor
- FittedAdaBoostClassifier / FittedAdaBoostRegressor
- FittedBaggingClassifier / Regressor
- FittedVotingClassifier / Regressor
- FittedIsolationForest (returns mean score_samples typically — sklearn doesn't define score for IF, can skip)

Reuse the r2_score helper from ferrolearn-neighbors::knn (or move it to ferrolearn-core).
